docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-08-2008 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9.OO U.S CURRENCY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER AND AGAINST CLAIMANT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KATY ANNE BERSAMIN, CSR #11722
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-20-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9.00; $663.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (OF: ANSWER TO INTERROGATORIES AND ANSWER TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; EVIDENCE ATTACHED PAY STUBS) FILED BY CLAIMANT JONES, LATASHA

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, Assitant District Attorney, for petitioner and moving party: People of the State of California

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
